properties.description: Locks the Beacon when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Turns the Beacon on when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
Sets the color of the Beacon. (See Data Network Colors.)
Returns whether the Beacon is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns whether the Beacon is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current amount of power, required by the Beacon, in watts.
